query:
-- Find all services that appear to be Telstra-related (by plan name or provider)
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.provider, s.monthlyCost, s.serviceType, 
  s.dataSource, s.customerExternalId, c.name as customerName,
  s.avcId, s.phoneNumber
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.provider = 'Telstra' 
   OR s.planName LIKE '%Telstra%' 
   OR s.planName LIKE '%telstra%'
   OR s.planName LIKE '%Starlink%'
   OR s.planName LIKE '%Enterprise Ethernet%'
   OR s.planName LIKE '%EE Fibre%'
ORDER BY s.monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 30;

-- Find Xero billing items that mention Telstra
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.contactName, bi.customerExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.description LIKE '%Telstra%' 
   OR bi.description LIKE '%telstra%'
   OR bi.description LIKE '%Enterprise Ethernet%'
   OR bi.description LIKE '%Starlink%'
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- Count services with unknown provider and high costs (likely Telstra/unidentified)
SELECT provider, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost
FROM services
WHERE monthlyCost > 50
GROUP BY provider
ORDER BY totalCost DESC;

-- Find all services that appear to be Telstra-related (by plan name or provider)
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.provider, s.monthlyCost, s.serviceType, 
  s.dataSource, s.customerExternalId, c.name as customerName,
  s.avcId, s.phoneNumber
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.provider = 'Telstra' 
   OR s.planName LIKE '%Telstra%' 
   OR s.planName LIKE '%telstra%'
   OR s.planName LIKE '%Starlink%'
   OR s.planName LIKE '%Enterprise Ethernet%'
   OR s.planName LIKE '%EE Fibre%'
ORDER BY s.monthlyCost DESC
LIMIT 30;

-- Find Xero billing items that mention Telstra
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.contactName, bi.customerExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.description LIKE '%Telstra%' 
   OR bi.description LIKE '%telstra%'
   OR bi.description LIKE '%Enterprise Ethernet%'
   OR bi.description LIKE '%Starlink%'
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 20;

-- Count services with unknown provider and high costs (likely Telstra/unidentified)
SELECT provider, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost
FROM services
WHERE monthlyCost > 50
GROUP BY provider
ORDER BY totalCost DESC;
